sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75018" key="o)rqotenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-τενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stretched out, straight,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.189</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:408" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">408</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
